basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has officially announced the Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 with 01 opening. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding an MBA, M.Tech, M.Sc. (Mathematics/ Statistics/ Finance/ Economics/ Physics/ Electronics/ Computer Science/ Information Technology), M.A. Economics, or M.Com from a recognized University are eligible to apply online. Interested candidates can submit their applications on or before 11 August 2026 through the official website, iimk.ac.in. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are share

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will receive age relaxation as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/ M Tech/ MSc. Mathematics / Statistics/ Finance/ Economics/ Physics / Electronics/ Computer Science/ Information Technology/ M.A Economics/ M. Com from a recognized University.
qualification.details: Academic Associate: MBA/ M Tech/ MSc. Mathematics / Statistics/ Finance/ Economics/ Physics/ Electronics/ Computer Science/ Information Technology/ M.A Economics/ M. Com from a recognized University.

salary_details.details: Academic Associate: Rs. 27,800/- per month (including Rs 3,500/- as financial support for accommodation & Rs.300/- as Telephone Allowance)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Associate position at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Associate position at IIM Kozhikode is 11 August 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA/M Tech/MSc. in Mathematics, Statistics, Finance, Economics, Physics, Electronics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or an M.A. in Economics or M. Com from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Academic Associate position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,800/- per month, which includes financial support for accommodation and a telephone allowance.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves initial screening and shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview conducted via video conference.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contractual position?
faq.answer: The Academic Associate position at IIM Kozhikode is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state in India can apply for this position, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for the Academic Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Academic Associate position must be submitted online through the official website of IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIM Kozhikode offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, IIM Kozhikode offers age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates as per the norms set by the Government of India.
